description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ubuntu:bionic Docker image. Set a before_script that links the Europe/Warsaw timezone and installs build-essential, g++, cmake, pkg-config, libglfw3-dev, libglew-dev, libgl1-mesa-dev and git via apt-get. Define a single stage called build and a job named build_and_run_tests in that stage that changes to /builds/gravoo/my_game, creates a build directory, runs cmake .., then make and make test. No services, caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are required.
